title: Fresh GSC Query Discovery — Phase 14B Day 3
data_source: zero-click-query-map.json + known GSC data. GSC Search Analytics API unavailable (404 — pitfall #28).
limitation: CANNOT pull fresh GSC query data programmatically. Google's Search Analytics API v3 does not expose this data via REST. Only URL Inspection API works (individual URLs).

known_impression_pages.the_7_fixed_pages: blog/20000-loan, blog/fed-2025, blog/mortgage-rates, blog/afford-100k, blog/credit-card-debt, compare/best-mortgage, blog/social-security-cola
known_impression_pages.remaining_5: From prior GSC data: 3 geo pages (loan/nashville-tn, loan/reno-nv, tax/philadelphia-pa — indexable), 1 tool variant (afford-100k-40k-6-5pct), 1 guide page
known_impression_pages.tier1_calculators: 10 indexed but no confirmed impression data (GSC API inaccessible)
known_impression_pages.other_blog_posts: ~95 blog posts — no confirmed impression data

honest_conclusion: Pages WITH confirmed impressions are almost exclusively the 7 fixed pages + a few others. Without GSC Search Analytics API access, we cannot discover new queries. Qasem should manually check GSC dashboard for new queries.
